reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to weigh Hunter Williams's newer, operative KLOW instruction: Hunter Williams, video_slug=the-klow-stack-bpc-157-tb-500-ghk-cu-kpv--239cdf43 (2026-04-08, cue 00:21:23, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-klow-stack-bpc-157-tb-500-ghk-cu-kpv--239cdf43/): "I would have 50mg of GHK, I'd have 10mgs of TB500, 10 mg of BPC, and 10 mgs KPV. I mix all of those into one vial with 3ml of bacteriostatic water and then I take 10 units of that per day. So what that ends up coming out to be is somewhere around the neighborhood of two milligrams of GHK and 500 micrograms of each of the other ones." The retained, older Hunter email instruction is: Hunter Williams, email threadId=198c4537f0cfbd90 (2025-08-19, https://youtu.be/mX9Gim98OEw): "Combine into one vial: * 50 mg GHK-Cu * 10 mg BPC-157 * 10 mg TB-500 * 10 mg KPV"; "Add 2 mL of bacteriostatic water"; "Draw 10 units (0.1 mL) daily"; "Each dose provides approximately: * 2.5 mg GHK-Cu * 500 mcg BPC-157 * 500 mcg TB-500 * 500 mcg KPV."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams, video_slug=saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c (2026-05-25, cue 01:46:00, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c/): "I personally wouldn't do that because of the BPC and the TB 500. And again, I'm not saying they cause cancer, but I prefer to cycle those because the nature of they are more growth promoting to which I would not always want to be signaling the growth promotion."
- Hunter Williams, video_slug=saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c (2026-05-25, cue 01:46:33, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-51626--2ce3e83c/): "I think it's dangerous. That's debatable, but I personally don't do that."
- Hunter Williams, email threadId=19bc90e12abefa74 (2026-01-16): "DO NOT mix vitamin C OR glutathione into the same vial as GHK-Cu."
- Hunter Williams, email threadId=19bc90e12abefa74 (2026-01-16): "If you see cloudiness or particulates -> don't use it (basic common sense)."
